artifacts.notes: Claim is limited to UMKC's recommendation for instructors and does not state that a university-wide student policy exists.
Claim describes UMKC's sample-policy categories and avoids treating examples as a single binding default policy.
Claim quotes the page's own mandatory wording about not uploading student work to GenAI products for assessment.
Claim is narrow to AI detectors as sole evidence and does not prohibit all detector use.
Claim is attributed to the UMKC CAFE faculty AI page and limited to syllabus AI usage policy guidance.
Claim is limited to library guidance for students and does not assert that all instructors allow ChatGPT.
Claim preserves the source's conditional 'may ask' wording.

artifacts.title: University of Missouri, Kansas City AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official UMKC sources found in this run include Provost guidance on generative AI syllabus policy statements, UMKC CAFE faculty AI guidance, and a UMKC Libraries guide on citing generative AI. Claims are staged as agent-reviewed candidates only and are limited to the official source language.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
This run did not find a separate official UMKC-wide binding generative AI policy page; the staged claims are limited to official guidance pages and library guidance.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
